narratives.evidence_quote: ऐसा लगता है कि भारत के कई हिस्सों में वसंत का मौसम गायब सा हो गया है.
narratives.reasoning: The text emphasizes a perception that spring has disappeared due to climate change and highlights temperature shifts and record warmth as alarming indicators, thereby actively amplifying fears about climate impacts.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: CC: Amplifying Climate Fears: Amplifying existing fears of global warming
subnarratives.evidence_quote: कई भारतीयों का कहना है कि बसंत का मौसम जैसे गायब सा हो गया है.
subnarratives.reasoning: The quote demonstrates the text presenting climate-change–related seasonal disruption as a widespread concern, aligning with the subnarrative of amplifying fears around global warming by portraying drastic, alarming changes in seasons.

subnarratives.evidence_quote: पर्यावरण में हो रहे बदलाव का दुष्प्रभाव अब किसी से छुपा नहीं है.
subnarratives.reasoning: This line signals a broad, alarmed portrayal of environmental changes without fitting a more specific subnarrative, thus justifying inclusion under the 'Other' category to capture the overall fear-evoking framing.
